news_title: Meiwu Technology Company Limited and Shenzhen Zhinuoweichuang Technology Co., Ltd Form Strategic Partnership
summary: Meiwu Technology (NASDAQ: WNW) has formed a strategic partnership with Shenzhen Zhinuo Weichuang Technology for comprehensive marketing services from July 2025 to June 2026. The agreement includes a fixed upfront fee of RMB 1,000,000 and monthly fees of RMB 200,000. Zhinuo Weichuang will provide market research, strategic planning, account management, and data analysis services across major Chinese e-commerce platforms including Taobao, JD.com, Pinduoduo, Douyin, Kuaishou, and WeChat. The partnership aims to enhance WNW's brand influence and market competitiveness through digital marketing technologies, user data analysis, and channel networks, targeting both domestic and international markets.
